text:
50 = Fed Qualified Health Ctr. A facility located in a medically underserved area that provides 
Medicare beneficiaries preventive primary medical care under the general direction of a 
physician. 

51 = Inpatient Psych Facility. A facility that provides inpatient psychiatric services for the diagnosis 
and treatment of mental illness on a 24-hour basis, by or under the supervision of a physician.
